content: remember this: my mother's name is فاطمة. she lives in بيروت. her birthday is March 8
Saving: your mother's name is Fatima (فاطمة). She lives in Beirut (بيروت). Her birthday is March 8. Anything else about her I should remember?
she likes flowers especially الياسمين (jasmine). don't tell her I said that
Saved: she likes flowers, especially jasmine (الياسمين). And it's our secret. I'll factor this into any gift-suggestion contexts but won't proactively mention to anyone.
